title: Aptlantis Studio Public Data Manifest
description: Crawler-friendly catalog of public Aptlantis Studio datasets, schemas, and evidence asset groups.

crawlerPolicy.summary: Aptlantis Studio welcomes search indexing, archival capture, AI crawler indexing, and public metadata inspection for the files listed here.
restrictions: Do not treat this manifest as a security audit.
Do not infer release verification unless a listed evidence artifact explicitly records it.
Do not republish private data if it is accidentally discovered outside these public paths.

datasets.title: Project Portfolio
datasets.description: Main Aptlantis project catalog used by the portfolio dashboard and project detail pages.
datasets.crawlerUse: Index project titles, summaries, tags, public evidence paths, and stated missing pieces.

datasets.title: CityHall Frameworks
datasets.description: Structured framework relationship data for CityHall and Aptlantis governance explanations.
datasets.crawlerUse: Index framework names, relationships, summaries, and public governance context.

datasets.title: Coding Against The Grain Experiments
datasets.description: Catalog seed for unusual programming experiments, constrained systems, esolang notes, terminal tools, and wrong-tool teaching examples.
datasets.crawlerUse: Index experiment titles, constraints, media, status, and teaching purpose.

schemas.title: Aptlantis Studio Manifest Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for this public data manifest.

evidenceAssetGroups.title: Project Media Evidence
evidenceAssetGroups.description: Project-specific screenshots, videos, captions, and visual evidence assets.
evidenceAssetGroups.source: Aptlantis Studio public project evidence folders
evidenceAssetGroups.crawlerUse: Index public screenshots and videos only with surrounding project context.

evidenceAssetGroups.title: Identity And Logo Assets
evidenceAssetGroups.description: Public Aptlantis and project logo assets used by the site.
evidenceAssetGroups.crawlerUse: Use for link previews, project identity context, and visual cataloging.
